intro.heading: VIVEK
intro.description: I am a 3rd-year Computer Science Engineering student at JIS University with a strong focus on frontend development and AI integration. I enjoy building scalable web applications, experimenting with LLMs, and crafting intuitive user experiences.

fancySection.subtitle: Experience & Interests
fancySection.content: I have worked as a Frontend Developer & AI Integrator at Pollinations AI, where I built modern UI systems and integrated AI-powered features. I actively contribute to developer communities and enjoy solving real-world problems using technology.
fancySection.contactNote: Interested in collaboration, internships, or freelance work? Feel free to reach out.
fancySection.shoutoutText: for shaping my technical journey and growth.
